core_mechanism: derivation of a system's governing field equations as the stationarity/extremum condition of an entropy functional — an entropy-maximization variational principle in which dynamics emerge from extremizing an entropy rather than being postulated
brief_reason: The abstract states the field equations are obtained 'from an entropy maximization principle' and given a thermodynamic interpretation, so the transferable machinery is deriving dynamical/equilibrium equations by extremizing an entropy functional.
